plan.description: The plan for the test. This should be the actual test plan with all the steps.

project.description: Project to use for setup. For example: "chromium", if no project is provided uses the first project in the config.

seedFile.description: A seed file contains a single test that is used to setup the page for testing, for example: "tests/seed.spec.ts". If no seed file is provided, a default seed file is created.
